ground.what_this_is: This is a focused review screen for a completed build that added a new feature called 'sentiment'. It shows the result of the work and allows you to verify it before it goes live.
ground.what_you_can_do: You can click the 'Show me it working' button to run a live demo of the new feature, or you can read the 'For the record' section to see which files were changed.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the toolbar region (canvas/app/src/regions/Toolbar.tsx); changing the light or controls is a code change there, surfaced via the build-intent wire.
howto.what: The live presence light on the toolbar bridge.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the system's current state at a glance (running / thinking / awaiting) and interact with the act controls.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the toolbar region (canvas/app/src/regions/Toolbar.tsx); adding or changing a layer action is a code change there, surfaced via the build-intent wire.
howto.what: The layers control on the toolbar.
howto.what_you_can_do: Open the layers panel to manage the system's structural depth.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the toolbar region (canvas/app/src/regions/Toolbar.tsx); changing its behavior is a code change there, surfaced via the build-intent wire.
howto.what: The wire command button on the bridge's command strip.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click this to initiate a new wire intent, translating the board's current state into a sent action.

howto.how_to_change: Mockup-only; no built code path maps to it yet.
howto.what: The force control on the toolbar.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click this to apply a force action to the board (mockup-only; not yet built).

howto.how_to_change: This surface is driven by the build-intent wire (WIRE-intent) surfacing the completed build state; the visible organ is the canvas region (canvas/app/src/regions/Canvas.tsx).
howto.what: The review surface for a completed build that surfaced a new node.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the build summary and the 'show me' action to verify the new node is placed and runnable before it goes live.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the build-review region (runtime/suite.py:review_verdicts); changing the demo logic is a code change there.
howto.what: A button on the build review card that launches a live demonstration of the new feature.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click it to run a live demo of the new 'sentiment' feature in the browser.

howto.how_to_change: The lane is defined in Inbox.tsx; the count logic lives in suite.py:inbox_lanes.
howto.what: The decision→build lane on the inbox, showing the count of items awaiting your decision.
howto.what_you_can_do: View the number of escalated decisions waiting for your verdict before they move to the build phase.

howto.how_to_change: Mockup-only; no built code path maps to this specific display yet.
howto.what: The provenance display on a build review card, showing the three specific wires (decision, intent, proposal) that generated this build.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the source wires to understand the origin of the build's logic and intent before verifying the result.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the build-review region (runtime/suite.py:review_verdicts); changing the action or text is a code change there.
howto.what: The 'send back' control on the build review card.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click this to re-queue the current build result to the wire with a reason, effectively pausing the current review state.
